TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang M'yutak ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 50 buwan, 133 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 126 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 7 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 89%, Amis 2%, Bunun 1%, Puyuma 1%, saySiyat 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na M'yutak hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na M'yutak hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na M'yutak hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na M'yutak hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na M'yutak hya' ga Mrmurak. tay 'zil na M'yutak hya' ga Spwan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ mʔjutak ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu naħuj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%, pujuma *%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na mʔjutak ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na mʔjutak ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na mʔjutak ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkrajaʔ na mʔjutak ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkrajaʔ na mʔjutak ħjaʔ ɣa mrmurak. taj ʔzil na mʔjutak ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕpwan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang M'yutak ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 50 buwan, 133 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 126 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 7 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 89%, Amis 2%, Bunun 1%, Puyuma 1%, saySiyat 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na M'yutak hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na M'yutak hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na M'yutak hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na M'yutak hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na M'yutak hya' ga Mrmurak. tay 'zil na M'yutak hya' ga Spwan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ mʔjutak ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu naħuj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%, pujuma *%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na mʔjutak ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na mʔjutak ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na mʔjutak ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkrajaʔ na mʔjutak ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkrajaʔ na mʔjutak ħjaʔ ɣa mrmurak. taj ʔzil na mʔjutak ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕpwan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
